# Assemble fixture brief

Notes before the sections are ignored by the assembler.

## Context

A purpose-built brief for the assemble-tool suite: two independent positions from
distinct providers, one objection carried inside a position file, assembled into an
open record that must lint clean.

## Question

Does the assemble tool emit a conforming open AIDR record from these inputs?
